title: Just View (NightVision/FullBrightness)
description: Just View improves Minecraft visibility by adding NightVision and FullBrightness modes, letting you explore, fight, and play without being limited by lighting conditions.
body: # Just View ## See clearly, day or night **Just View** is a lightweight Minecraft client-side mod that enhances **visibility in all conditions**. It provides **NightVision** and **FullBrightness** options to make exploring dark caves, nighttime environments, or dimly lit areas much easier, while keeping the game completely vanilla and fair. The mod is **easy to toggle**: simply press **G** to switch modes instantly, giving you full control without interrupting gameplay. ## 🔍 Features - **NightVision Mode**: see clearly in the dark - **FullBrightness Mode**: removes shadows and dark areas - **Toggle easily**: press **G** to switch modes instantly - **Client-side only**: safe for SMP - **Lightweight and performance-friendly** ## ⚠️ Important Notes - Visual-only enhancements - Optimized - Works with other performance and PvP mods
